name: RSS Feed Generator — Firecrawl Scrape + AI Extraction to Slack
description: Scrapes a website with Firecrawl to extract its content, uses Claude AI to identify articles and updates, formats them as a structured feed summary, and posts it to Slack.

source.originalName: Create an RSS feed based on a website's content

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the feed summary

websiteUrl.description: Website URL to scrape for articles/updates (e.g. 'https://techcrunch.com')

steps.name: Extract content and links from scraped data
Build AI prompt for feed extraction
Run Claude AI to extract feed items
Parse AI response and strip fences
Build Slack Block Kit feed summary
